name: python3-gi-cairo
title: python3-gi-cairo
summary: Python 3 Cairo bindings for the GObject library
description:
Python 3 Cairo bindings for the GObject library
GObject is an abstraction layer that allows programming with an object
paradigm that is compatible with many languages. It is a part of Glib,
the core library used to build GTK+ and GNOME.
.
This package contains the Python 3 Cairo bindings for GObject. It is mostly
used by other bindings to map their GObjects to Python objects.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gi-cairo because Python 3 Cairo bindings for the GObject library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gi-cairo as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gi-cairo with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gi-cairo --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
